title: Mazars Comment: Does the rally have legs? Yes. Short ones
section_path: Mazars Comment: Does the rally have legs? Yes. Short ones
section_path_text: Mazars Comment: Does the rally have legs? Yes. Short ones
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this week:
This summer equity rally is by all means welcome, and it's happening for good reasons over the shorter term. The Fed Put is back and officials have signalled that we are near the end of rate hikes. Markets are mean reverting after a bad year.
